Del Sol Cycling FPV Scuba Рух · Vancouver
Del Sol

Build Log

1993 Honda Del Sol — EG2 chassis. Suspension first, then interior, then custom work. Documented as it happens, in order, without skipping the ugly parts.

ENTRY 001 Mar 2, 2026 The BeginnningAssessment

Starting point — what we're working with

Assessment of the vehicle condition before any work begins. Body rust, worn bushings throughout, subframe in better shape than expected. New name.
ENTRY 002 Feb 28, 2026 BodyLighting

Tail light assembly — off, inspected, replaced

Pulled both tail light assemblies to assess the condition and fit a replacement unit sourced from a wrecker. Found surface oxidation on the housing mount points and a hairline crack...
RUKH

Рух — movement.
Built, ridden, flown, dived.
Vancouver, BC.
